ddls:
CREATE TABLE "institutions" (
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each institution */,
  "institution_name" TEXT /* Name of the institution */,
  "institution_about" TEXT /* Description of the institution */,
  "institution_location" TEXT /* Location of the institution */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the institution is located */,
  "campus_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each campus within the institution */,
  "campus_location" TEXT /* Location of each campus */,
  "campus_description" TEXT /* Description of each campus */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the institution offering the program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the program */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the program */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the program */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of program (e.g., business, technology) */,
  "program_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the program */,
  "program_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the program */,
  "program_capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of students the program can accommodate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_programs_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "admission_requirements" (
  "requirement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each admission requirement */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program the requirement belongs to */,
  "grade_score" REAL /* Minimum grade score required */,
  "overall_band" REAL /* Minimum overall band required */,
  "pte_score" REAL /* Minimum PTE score required */,
  "tofel_point" REAL /* Minimum TOFEL point required */,
  "ielts_listening" REAL /* Minimum IELTS listening score required */,
  "ielts_speaking" REAL /* Minimum IELTS speaking score required */,
  "ielts_writting" REAL /* Minimum IELTS writing score required */,
  "ielts_reading" REAL /* Minimum IELTS reading score required */,
  "document_required" TEXT /* Documents required for admission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("requirement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_admission_requirements_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fees" (
  "fee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fee */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program the fee belongs to */,
  "tuition_fee_per_semester" REAL /* Tuition fee per semester */,
  "application_fee" REAL /* Application fee */,
  "other_fees" REAL /* Other fees */,
  "payment_terms" TEXT /* Payment terms for tuition fees */,
  "scholarship_available" TEXT /* Availability of scholarships for the program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fees_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "accommodations" (
  "accommodation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each accommodation */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program the accommodation belongs to */,
  "accommodation_feature" TEXT /* Accommodation feature (e.g., yes, no) */,
  "accommodation_type" TEXT /* Type of accommodation */,
  "accommodation_cost" REAL /* Cost of accommodation per semester */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("accommodation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accommodations_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "work_permits" (
  "work_permit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each work permit */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program the work permit belongs to */,
  "work_permit_feature" TEXT /* Work permit feature (e.g., yes, no) */,
  "work_permit_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the work permit */,
  "work_permit_eligibility" TEXT /* Eligibility criteria for the work permit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("work_permit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_work_permits_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "program_cooperations" (
  "program_cooperation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program cooperation */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program the cooperation belongs to */,
  "program_cooperation" TEXT /* Program cooperation (e.g., yes, no) */,
  "cooperation_partner" TEXT /* Partner institution or organization for the program cooperation */,
  "cooperation_description" TEXT /* Description of the program cooperation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_cooperation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_program_cooperations_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "acceptance_letters" (
  "acceptance_letter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each acceptance letter */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program the acceptance letter belongs to */,
  "acceptance_letter" TEXT /* Acceptance letter (e.g., yes, no) */,
  "acceptance_letter_date" TEXT /* Date the acceptance letter was issued */,
  "acceptance_letter_status" TEXT /* Status of the acceptance letter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("acceptance_letter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_acceptance_letters_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program the student is enrolled in */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "grade_score" REAL /* Grade score of the student */,
  "overall_band" REAL /* Overall band of the student */,
  "pte_score" REAL /* PTE score of the student */,
  "tofel_point" REAL /* TOFEL point of the student */,
  "ielts_listening" REAL /* IELTS listening score of the student */,
  "ielts_speaking" REAL /* IELTS speaking score of the student */,
  "ielts_writting" REAL /* IELTS writing score of the student */,
  "ielts_reading" REAL /* IELTS reading score of the student */,
  "student_status" TEXT /* Status of the student */,
  "student_address" TEXT /* Address of the student */,
  "student_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the student */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Emergency contact information for the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructors" (
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program the instructor is teaching */,
  "instructor_name" TEXT /* Name of the instructor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the instructor */,
  "instructor_title" TEXT /* Title of the instructor */,
  "instructor_department" TEXT /* Department the instructor belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instructors_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program the course belongs to */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the course */,
  "coursecredits" INTEGER /* Number of credits for the course */,
  "course_prerequisites" TEXT /* Prerequisites for the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the assignment belongs to */,
  "assignment_name" TEXT /* Name of the assignment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the assignment */,
  "assignment_submission_date" TEXT /* Submission date for the assignment */,
  "assignment_grade" REAL /* Grade for the assignment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assignments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grades" (
  "grade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grade */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student who earned the grade */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the grade belongs to */,
  "grade" REAL /* Grade earned by the student */,
  "grade_letter" TEXT /* Letter grade for the student */,
  "grade_comments" TEXT /* Comments for the grade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grades_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grades_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visa_processing" (
  "visa_processing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visa processing */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student who is processing a visa */,
  "visa_processing_days" INTEGER /* Number of days required for visa processing */,
  "visa_type" TEXT /* Type of visa */,
  "visa_status" TEXT /* Status of the visa application */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visa_processing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visa_processing_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campuses" (
  "campus_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each campus */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the institution the campus belongs to */,
  "campus_location" TEXT /* Location of the campus */,
  "campus_description" TEXT /* Description of the campus */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campus_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campuses_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id")
)
